uid.description: Represents the TRUSTX bidder system Ad Slot ID. Alternative to secid.

secid.description: Alternative to uid. Represents the TRUSTX bidder system Ad Slot ID.

bidFloor.description: Floor of the impression opportunity. If present in the request overrides XML info.

currency.description: Currency for bid floor. Defaults to USD.

test.description: Enable test mode to receive test creatives without real Ad Slots.
